channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Death Count In PoK Protest Rises To 20: Report

media:content.media:description: Supporters of JAAC have been pressing ahead with protests despite action.

item.description: Many shops in the main city of Muzaffarabad have closed this week in support of the JAAC's calls for businesses to strike, and mobile internet has been largely inaccessible for residents.
item.content:encoded: Many shops in the main city of Muzaffarabad have closed this week in support of the JAAC's calls for businesses to strike, and mobile internet has been largely inaccessible for residents.

item.title: China Arrests US Think Tank Founder On Suspicion Of Spying

media:content.media:description: It is not clear whether Min Zin was conducting research at the time he was apprehended.

item.description: Min Zin, founder of the Institute for Strategy and Policy Myanmar (ISP-M), "has been subjected to criminal compulsory measures", Chinese foreign ministry spokesman Lin Jian told a news briefing.
item.content:encoded: Min Zin, founder of the Institute for Strategy and Policy Myanmar (ISP-M), "has been subjected to criminal compulsory measures", Chinese foreign ministry spokesman Lin Jian told a news briefing.

item.title: "Stop, Repent": Pope Leo's Warning To Human Traffickers Exploiting Migrants

media:content.media:description: Pope Leo is visiting the Canary Islands.

item.description: Pope Leo said he wanted to directly address those who "take advantage of peoples' desperation (or) organise death routes".
item.content:encoded: Pope Leo said he wanted to directly address those who "take advantage of peoples' desperation (or) organise death routes".

item.title: Trump Allies Float Alternate Ways To Pay 'Weaponisation' Victims

media:content.media:description: Trump's anti-weaponisation fund was put on hold amid fierce opposition.

item.description: Trump repeatedly has expressed support for federal payouts to supporters who he has portrayed as being targeted by a "weaponised" US government under Joe Biden.
item.content:encoded: Trump repeatedly has expressed support for federal payouts to supporters who he has portrayed as being targeted by a "weaponised" US government under Joe Biden.

item.title: 'Europe's Weapons Used To Attack India': S Jaishankar On West's Double Standards

media:content.media:description: Jaishankar said India bought Russian oil because US asked New Delhi to do so

item.description: Jaishankar highlighted Europe's moral ambiguity and blamed them for selling weapons to countries that attack India. He said that India has never done anything to cause harm to Europe.
item.content:encoded: Jaishankar highlighted Europe's moral ambiguity and blamed them for selling weapons to countries that attack India. He said that India has never done anything to cause harm to Europe.

item.title: Control Of Hormuz, Release Of Frozen Asset: What Iran Said On Draft US Deal

media:content.media:description: Traffic through Hormuz has come under Iranian control since the outbreak of war.

item.description: On Thursday, US President Donald Trump said he had called off planned strikes on Iran and claimed a deal to end the war could be signed in the coming days.
item.content:encoded: On Thursday, US President Donald Trump said he had called off planned strikes on Iran and claimed a deal to end the war could be signed in the coming days.

item.title: Singapore Court Pauses Its Order Against Byju's Founder In Contempt Case

media:content.media:description: No arrest warrant was issued against Raveendran.

item.description: The original order of May 25 would have required Raveendran to appear on June 15.
item.content:encoded: The original order of May 25 would have required Raveendran to appear on June 15.

item.title: Battle For Steel: Why ArcelorMittal Is In The Eye Of Storm In France

media:content.media:description: The trigger was a series of job cuts announced across ArcelorMittal's French operations.

item.description: For many lawmakers, ArcelorMittal has become a symbol of a fear: Europe is losing industrial foundations on which its economic strength was built.
item.content:encoded: For many lawmakers, ArcelorMittal has become a symbol of a fear: Europe is losing industrial foundations on which its economic strength was built.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | An Indian-Origin Sikh, A Dead Teenager: The Murder That Has Set Britain On Fire
item.description: The horrific details came to light last week when a court sentenced the 23-old-old Vickrum Digwa, a British-born man of Indian Sikh heritage, to life imprisonment.
item.content:encoded: The horrific details came to light last week when a court sentenced the 23-old-old Vickrum Digwa, a British-born man of Indian Sikh heritage, to life imprisonment.

item.title: US-Iran War Live: Trump Cancels Iran Strikes After 'High-Level Approval' Of Talks
item.description: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.
item.content:encoded: US-Israel-Iran War News Live Updates: Trump said key points of a potential agreement have been worked out with support from several countries, raising hopes of a deal soon.

item.title: 'Did You Like It': Pak Migrant Rapes 'Drunk' UK Teen, Jailed For 10 Years

media:content.media:description: Malik is a Pakistani asylum seeker who has lived in France, Germany and Italy

item.description: The survivor repeatedly protested during the assault, but the accused called her "a slut" repeatedly after the attack.
item.content:encoded: The survivor repeatedly protested during the assault, but the accused called her "a slut" repeatedly after the attack.

item.title: India, Bangladesh Agree To Boost Border Coordination Amid Migration Row

media:content.media:description: Two sides also discussed human trafficking, border deaths, smuggling, infrastructure

item.description: Border Guard Bangladesh (BGB) and India's Border Security Force (BSF) described the discussions as "cordial, positive and forward-looking", according to a statement
item.content:encoded: Border Guard Bangladesh (BGB) and India's Border Security Force (BSF) described the discussions as "cordial, positive and forward-looking", according to a statement

item.title: US Plans Major Cut In Military Assets For NATO Operations In Europe: Report

media:content.media:description: The decision would limit NATO's ability to launch long-range strikes

item.description: The US plan includes cutting the number of F-16 and F-15E fighter jets from roughly 150 to 100, as well as reducing maritime reconnaissance aircraft from 26 to 15
item.content:encoded: The US plan includes cutting the number of F-16 and F-15E fighter jets from roughly 150 to 100, as well as reducing maritime reconnaissance aircraft from 26 to 15

item.title: Science Fiction? Experts Say Musk's SpaceX Ambitions May Be Unrealistic

media:content.media:description: SpaceX has other major projects on its plate -- including building a modified Starship

item.description: As SpaceX makes its record-breaking public market debut, some experts express doubts it can reach its lofty goals, especially on its planned timeline.
item.content:encoded: As SpaceX makes its record-breaking public market debut, some experts express doubts it can reach its lofty goals, especially on its planned timeline.

item.title: Trump Examined By 22 Specialists, Highest For Any US President: White House

media:content.media:description: The official added that the total count of 22 specialists also included some general physicians

item.description: The official added that the total count of 22 specialists also included some general physicians.
item.content:encoded: The official added that the total count of 22 specialists also included some general physicians.

item.title: Canadian Mother Sues OpenAI, Says ChatGPT Encouraged Daughter's Suicide

media:content.media:description: The lawsuit, filed Thursday in a San Francisco court, was brought by Kristie Carrier

item.description: The mother alleged that ChatGPT failed to respond appropriately despite Alice telling the bot about her suicidal thoughts a dozen times before her death.
item.content:encoded: The mother alleged that ChatGPT failed to respond appropriately despite Alice telling the bot about her suicidal thoughts a dozen times before her death.

item.title: Scientists Bake Sourdough Bread From Yeast Found On 5000-Year-Old Mummy

media:content.media:description: A researcher examines hand of Otzi, a man whose body was preserved in glacial ice for over 5,300 years

item.description: The yeast was found on Otzi, one of the world’s best-preserved prehistoric human remains discovered frozen in the Alps near the Italy-Austria border in 1991.
item.content:encoded: The yeast was found on Otzi, one of the world’s best-preserved prehistoric human remains discovered frozen in the Alps near the Italy-Austria border in 1991.

item.title: Boy Dies After Choking On Doughnut In US School, TikTok Challenge Suspected

media:content.media:description: Authorities believe the student may have been eating a doughnut at the time of the incident

item.description: The sixth-grade student became unresponsive at school and later died at a hospital
item.content:encoded: The sixth-grade student became unresponsive at school and later died at a hospital

item.title: 'Netanyahu Was In Dark About Trump's Iran Plans, Was Left Surprised': Report

media:content.media:description: Trump has largely embraced his 'friend' Netanyahu's Iran strategy

item.description: The reports of friction between 'friends' Trump and Netanyahu-- who started the war in lockstep -- come as the US and Israel's war interests diverge.
item.content:encoded: The reports of friction between 'friends' Trump and Netanyahu-- who started the war in lockstep -- come as the US and Israel's war interests diverge.

item.title: Why Mysterious '8647' On Grass Sent US Cops, National Guard Into Overdrive

media:content.media:description: Grass samples have been collected and an investigation is underway.

item.description: While '8647' has been adopted by Trump's opponents to voice their protest, the administration interprets it it as call to violence.
item.content:encoded: While '8647' has been adopted by Trump's opponents to voice their protest, the administration interprets it it as call to violence.
